name: Chili Relleno Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chilies open and line an 8-inch x 13-inch baking dish with them.
2. Layer both cheeses evenly over the chilies.
3. Add any remaining chilies over the cheese layer.
4. Mix flour with a small amount of milk to make a smooth paste using a wire whisk.
5. Mix in the remaining milk and sour cream.
6. Beat in eggs, one at a time, then add diced meat.
7. Pour the mixture over the chilies and cheese; bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Pour salsa over top and bake an additional 15 minutes.
